name: Chris Farley
blurb: An explosive physical comedian and one of SNL's most beloved players.
bio: Chris Farley (1964-1997) was an American comedian and actor whose physical, all-in style made him a Saturday Night Live star from 1990 to 1995, with the motivational speaker Matt Foley among his most famous creations. He headlined films including Tommy Boy before his early death.

bits.t: Matt Foley: Van Down By The River
